setupDescription: Create the first administrator for this environment.
loginDescription: Use your company login to access the dashboard.

validation.passwordWeak: The password does not meet the security requirements

sso.discovery_failed: Could not reach the identity provider.
sso.provider_error: The identity provider rejected the sign-in.
sso.missing_params: Incomplete sign-in response. Please try again.
sso.invalid_state: Your sign-in session expired. Please try again.
sso.invalid_token: Could not validate the provider's response.
sso.email_not_allowed: Your email domain does not have access to this environment.
sso.email_conflict: An account already exists with this email. Contact the administrator.
sso.not_provisioned: Your account has not been provisioned yet. Contact the administrator.
